Wilde_Guess

calendar_today Member since December 15, 2017

schedule Last active April 23, 2026

person About
star Authors
bookmark Recommended
menu_book Reading
edit_note Stories

description About

Not much to say.  I could use a beta.  Reviews are nice.  Politics is a good way to lose at least half of your audience, unless you're a political commentator.

BronxWench's style is elegant and readable.  If you are trying to improve your writing, use her as an example.

Not Decent Proposal

by WarrenConey
Bob's Burgers (2011) - After an incident on Halloween night, Millie and Louise compete to win candy from Rudy.

Eliza, Your Average Girl

by WarrenConey
The Wild Thornberrys - 1998 - After trying to take advantage of her brother, Eliza discovers they have a shared interest. - This story takes place in an alternate universe, where Eliza never had power ...
folder Harry Potter 1 story
expand_more

Blood Ties and Betrayal

by burynr08
Cassie Black, the daughter of Lord Voldemort and Bellatrix Lestrange, has wanted nothing more than to become an Auror. During her seventh year at Hogwarts, she must deal not only with Minister Fudge's ...
comment "

This story is well written and captivating.  It is also up to 57 decent size chapters.  The OC Lead is believable, makes sense, and allows a new perspective on the canon characters.

"

The Sídhe's Apprentice

by BronxWench
Alistair Brady just wanted to be a wizard like his grandfather, which meant studying magic with the prickly and dangerous Sídhe. He never planned on falling in love, until he looked into the icy gray ...
comment "

This story is well and tightly written with no wasted words or shortage of words.  The story is a one-shot, yet while satisfying also makes you wish you could turn the page or click the "next chapter" icon to read more.  It is a brilliant read.

"

menu_book Current Reading

folder Harry Potter 1 story
expand_more

Blood Ties and Betrayal

by burynr08
Cassie Black, the daughter of Lord Voldemort and Bellatrix Lestrange, has wanted nothing more than to become an Auror. During her seventh year at Hogwarts, she must deal not only with Minister Fudge's mistrust of her true intentions, but Dumbledore's unending manipulation to get what he wants. Her blossoming attraction to lifetime friend Professor Snape, who she assumes will be horrified if he finds out her true feelings, threatens to ruin everything she holds dear. (Starts during Sorceror's Stone. Severus/OC).
folder Original 4 stories
expand_more

Carmen Elisa Needs to Die

by Thundercloud
Quests often happen for a heroic reason, like a danger that must be defeated. This is not such a story. Carmen Elisa needs to die....she just does not know it yet. There is a demon inside the sword and until I find Carmen I will make full use of the power granted to me as I make my every desire come true.

With the Mirror Came

by Thundercloud
What if you are not in full control of your life anymore What if accidents of sexual nature keep happening to you no matter how careful you are What if someone or something out there imagine you as their center of the sexual fantasy Ronja is about to find out because she got something with home that she did not expect

The Captain's Cabin

by PyTerato
(Written for the two challenges: Pirate porn and “Burp” porn.) When Itzcali woke up this morning, he didn't think he’d live to see the sunset. Playing the sacrificial lamb is his price to pay to keep the invading Europeans from slaughtering his tribe. But when a cavalier British pirate shows up, Itzcali’s life is forever changed.

Jefferey 1

by Desiderius_Price
Jeff’s caught up in the headwinds of a bitter divorce, a journey that begins with him being removed as a young boy from his familial home in his birthday suit, continues as he grows up in a seditious cult believing in the freedom to pursue intelligence and happiness outside the shackles of evangelical teachings. This is his story.
